AddressInfo.Title: E.On DC-only Public Charging Station(CCS-only).
AddressInfo.AccessComments: Unlimited public access,but only for rich persons,who can afford a new EV with CCS. INCOMPATIBLE WITH OLDER VEHICLES,NO CHAdeMO,NO MENNEKES,NO WALL-SOCKET!!!U HAVE NO CHANCE TO CHARGE AN OLDER EV/PHEV,& THERE IS ABSOLUTELY NO CHANCE FOR ANY CHANGE,THE OPERATOR INSISTS TO NEVER EVER ADD ANY OTHER CONNECTOR TO ENABLE ANY BACKWARDS COMPATIBILITY.

Connections.Comments: only for new vehicles with CCS.

GeneralComments: Both,E.On & Kaufland repeatedly & strictly refused to add any other type of connector(i asked for wall-socket/Mennekes/CHAdeMO),they insist,this will always be only for new vehicles with 0 tollerance to older vehicles & their crews.
